category_sources: Official GitHub README describes nmail as a terminal-based email client with Alpine-like UI.
source_facts.description says terminal-based email client for Linux and macOS.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title and README heading use nmail.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains usage, installation, setup, and configuration documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/d99kris/nmail; per instruction, not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README lists IMAP/SMTP support, terminal UI, setup, and configuration features.
